name: silver_invalid_claims_check
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS invalid_count FROM MULTISTAGE_VALIDATION.DATA_VALIDATOR_SILVER_LAKE.SILVER_ENTERPRISE_MEDICAL_CLAIMS WHERE RECORD_QUALITY_STATUS <> 'VALID'
target_query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ROW_COUNT), 0) AS invalid_count FROM MULTISTAGE_VALIDATION.DATA_VALIDATOR_GOLD_LAKE.GOLD_MEDALLION_DATA_QUALITY_SUMMARY WHERE DOMAIN = 'ENTERPRISE_CLAIMS' AND RECORD_QUALITY_STATUS <> 'VALID'
